display.purpose: Main display page titles and headers.

body.purpose: Markdown study notes, exam questions, and UI labels.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Ambient depth blur beneath glass dashboard cards.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all card lifts and state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard call-to-action button for initiating study sessions, uploads, or exams.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8b5cf6; color: #f3f4f6; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #7c3aed; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Unified dashboard card container for grouping content like notes, files, or exams.
components.html:
Subject Note

Synthesized notes ready to review.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.45); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding: 24px; border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-card-glass:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); box-shadow: 0 12px 45px -8px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f3f4f6; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: StudyForge is designed as a focused, premium, and distraction-free dark study environment. Visually, it evokes the depth of a starry night sky using a dark background (#080c14) accented by glowing violet nebula clouds (brand purple colors) and glassmorphic card overlays that structure information without creating rigid walls.
keyCharacteristics: Dark Mode Void: Main background is deep void black (#080c14).
Glassmorphism: Cards use blurred backgrounds (rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.45) with 20px blur) to float content elegantly.
Clean Hierarchy: High weight contrast between Outfit display headers and Inter body text.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: Text colors must maintain at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the background. Text styling should not use low-contrast gray colors on card surfaces.

rules.name: The Reading Length Rule
rules.body: Long-form generated study notes must be bounded to a max-width of 75ch to prevent scanning fatigue.

rules.name: The State Elevation Rule
rules.body: Shadows are response-only. Cards and buttons lift slightly (Y-translation -2px) and receive increased shadow blur only on hover.

dos: Do wrap note text at 75ch to make reading easier.
Do use native dialogs or absolute-positioned dropdowns outside overflow-hidden wrappers.
Do preserve the deep void background (#080c14) for all main screens.
donts: Don't use overly rounded corners (exceeding 12px) on cards or panels.
Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents on cards.
Don't use saturated warm cream or sand backgrounds.
